_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin deficiency-associated transcriptional dysregulation suggests a novel therapy for tibial pseudoarthrosis in NF1.

_contextSnippet: In a fifth individual (NF#12), 17qLOH was detected by WES, which also confirmed somatic homozygosity of the mutant NF1 allele
details: Detected somatic homozygosity of mutant NF1 allele in individual NF#12 and confirmed somatic sequence mutations in six additional individuals
